name: tier3_control_id_in_text
description: Tier 3 canonical path: body text mentions a control ID 'AC-2'. The tagger scans the text via _CONTROL_ID_RE (uppercase only, NOT case-insensitive), normalizes to 'ac-2', and tags every child Objective of that control at confidence 0.5. Relevance is a TF-IDF cosine band [_TIER3_RELEVANCE_FLOOR 0.35, _TIER3_RELEVANCE_CEIL 0.75] (2026-06-10) — pinned as a band rather than an exact float because the cosine is content-dependent and varies across sklearn versions. This minimal catalog has a single AC-2 child so only one tag is expected — the full child fan-out is pinned separately in pin_tier3_spray_one_mention_tags_all_children.

evidence.text: This policy implements AC-2 account management requirements.
